metadata.description: oh-my-gjc — the oh-my suite for Gajae Code (gjc): one core plugin + optional power plugins.

plugins.name: oh-my-gjc
plugins.description: The core plugin — install this first. easy-answer (plain-language answers), gate-briefing (domain-blind approval-gate briefings), multivendor model presets (ideal / escalate-surgical / monorepo), session toggles + always-on semaphores (AGENTS.md marker blocks), /oh-my-gjc:audit (Fable 5 adversarial safety audit, proven to catch consensus-missed CRITICALs), and /oh-my-gjc:setup which detects your environment and recommends the optional plugins below. Absorbs the former my-workflows and multivendor-presets plugins.

plugins.name: codex-cli-control
plugins.description: Skill-first plugin that runs the local Codex CLI ('codex exec') non-interactively with a sandbox policy, sends one prompt, and returns Codex's final message. No desktop App/CDP required.

plugins.name: codex-deepwork
plugins.description: Skill-first plugin that delegates an autonomous, file-writing coding task to Codex ('codex exec' with a write sandbox), automatically leveraging the LazyCodex harness (deep-work skills, specialist agents, verification) when installed.

plugins.name: lazycodex
plugins.description: Set up and drive the LazyCodex (OmO Codex Light) deep-work harness: install/update/check it in ~/.codex via npx, then run plan->work->verify (ultrawork) coding tasks through Codex with its skills/hooks/verification engaged.

plugins.name: codex-app-control
plugins.description: Control the Codex desktop App GUI: codex-app-launch starts an already-built Linux wrapper headlessly (xvfb) with remote debugging (CDP) and waits until ready; codex-app-cdp attaches gjc's browser via an explicit cdp_url, sends one prompt, and returns the latest completed response.

plugins.name: insane-review
plugins.description: Use GPT-5.5 Pro (web-only, no API) from inside gjc: gjc scopes the complete relevant file set, repomix-packs it (full code, line numbers, secretlint), drives your logged-in ChatGPT web session over CDP, verifies the model fail-closed, and harvests the review to .insane-review/. Zero API cost. Also works as a web-only agent-council member. Faithful port of fivetaku/insane-review with the engine kept intact.

plugins.name: gjc-bugwatch
plugins.description: Dogfooding bug collector for gjc: a batch scanner reads ~/.gjc/logs (+ optional session transcripts), extracts/dedupes/redacts runtime errors and crashes, then /gjc-bugwatch:scan triages each candidate, reproduces it against a gajae-code clone, and collects upstream issue/PR drafts under .gjc/bugwatch/drafts/. Drafts only (no auto PR), read-only.

plugins.name: example-plugin
plugins.description: Starter template plugin: ships one slash command and one skill. Copy it to build your own plugin.
